---
name: POA&M Item
about: Track remediation work for a compliance weakness
title: "[POAM] "
labels: poam
assignees: ''
---

## POAM ID
Example: POAM-004

## Related Control
Example: RA-5

## Weakness Description
Describe the gap or weakness.

## Risk Level
Low, Moderate, High

## Remediation Plan
Describe the corrective action and owner.

## Evidence Reference
Link to the evidence location, pull request, or scan result.

## Milestones
List any intermediate milestones.

## Target Completion Date
Add the planned completion date.
